narrative:
Saybrook Twp township has 6,730 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.4 percentage points.
